hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi

FILE=$(echo $TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(packages/db/src/generated/|packages/web/src/gql/)'; then echo 'This file is auto-generated. Modify the source and re-run the generator instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
